compiled_state.title: T2: centralize + standardize structured-output flag on --output/-o (drop --json/--format)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Introduce ONE canonical structured-output flag --output VALUE (short -o VALUE), values json|llm|text. Remove legacy --json and --format=* (breaking, pre-1.0). CENTRALIZE parsing in a single sourced bash helper (new ticket-output.sh: _match_output_flag/_validate_output_format) used by every read script (show/list/ready/validate/next-batch/bridge-status), replacing the ~6 duplicated --format=* case arms + bespoke 'unsupported format' strings. argparse choices for ticket-ready.py. Update library (__init__.py next-batch/validate calls), MCP, CLI usage strings, all tests, README/docs. AC: rebar grep shows no rebar-owned --json/--format=* outside acli/jira/git/gh contexts; all three interfaces accept -o/--output; tests green.

comments.body:
TARGETS (confirmed by 3 parallel Explore agents; rebar-owned flags only).

NEW FILE:
- src/rebar/_engine/ticket-output.sh — shared sourced helper: _match_output_flag <arg> <next> <allowed> (sets _OUTPUT_FMT/_OUTPUT_CONSUMED_NEXT; returns 0 match / 1 not-output-flag / 2 invalid) + _validate_output_format. Accepts -o V, -o=V, --output V, --output=V. Replaces the ~6 duplicated --format=* case arms + bespoke "unsupported format" strings.

CHANGE — engine (rebar's own flag):
- rebar (dispatcher) usage strings: lines 20,59,88,89,107,114,129
- ticket-lib-api.sh (show arm + list arm): 164,166,177,184,222,231,234,235,322,388,391,392,420,432
- ticket-show.sh: 5,9,11,60,73,76,77
- ticket-list.sh: 5,13,60,63,64,92,93,108
- ticket-bridge-status.sh: 5,6,43,52,55,56  (--format=json -> --output json)
- validate-issues.sh: 14,49,70,77  (--json -> --output json)
- ticket-next-batch.sh: 19,119,128,143  (--json -> --output json)
- ticket-ready.py: argparse --output/-o choices [ids,llm,json]; drop --json + --format; lines 10,17,18,20,21,76-86,114-124
- ticket_reducer/_present.py:8, _filters.py:5 (docstring mentions only)

CHANGE — library:
- src/rebar/__init__.py:206 validate ["validate","--json"] -> ["validate","--output","json"]
- src/rebar/__init__.py:329 next-batch [...,"--json"] -> [...,"--output","json"]
- src/rebar/_reads.py:131 docstring mention

INTERNAL-SELF-CALL (rebar calling rebar; MUST update):
- rebar_reconciler/check-obligations.sh:49  ticket list ... --format=llm -> --output llm

CHANGE — tests (update invocations + assertions + docstrings):
- tests/interfaces/adapters.py:176,179

- tests/scripts/test-ticket-ready-dispatcher.sh:283-309,334-358

RENAME: tests/interfaces/test_ready_json.py -> test_ready_output.py (whole file is about ready --json)

CHANGE — docs:
- README.md:204 (rebar's own --json in prose)

EXCLUDE (external CLIs — do NOT touch):
- acli-integration.py (all --json: acli/jira); rebar_reconciler/probe_gap*.sh (acli); _attestation.py:128, applier.py:183, ticket-fsck-recover.sh:213/236/249 (git log --format); docs/releasing.md:48 (gh run list --json); tests/.../test_outbound_differ_live_comment_fetch.py:4 (acli); tests/scripts/test-push-tickets-dirty-wd-recovery.sh:154 (git log --format).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
TARGETS — VERIFICATION CORRECTIONS (Explore audit). Verdict: complete & accurate except:
+ ADD dispatcher CHANGE targets: rebar:53 and rebar:64 (the _print_overview() help text also names --json for validate/next-batch). Targets only listed the per-subcommand usage lines.
+ CENTRALIZATION sourcing gaps: ticket-list.sh, ticket-bridge-status.sh, validate-issues.sh currently source NOTHING — each needs a `source "$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-output.sh"` line added. ticket-show.sh (sources ticket-lib.sh) + ticket-next-batch.sh (sources rebar-config.sh) already source a shared lib. DECISION: ticket-lib-api.sh should source ticket-output.sh itself (it's the in-process show/list home), and ticket-output.sh must be self-contained (no deps) so standalone scripts can source it directly.
+ No misclassifications; EXCLUDE list fully correct (all external git/acli/jira/gh). No hidden flag-parse sites — dispatcher delegates parsing to subcommands; the `ticket` symlink/script shares the same dispatcher.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: ARCH DECISION (maintainer): standardize the output-flag on PYTHON, no duplicate bash/Python logic. Single source = src/rebar/_engine/ticket_output.py (parse_output(argv, profile) -> (fmt, rest); profiles: reader=default json/{json,llm}, ready=default text/{text,llm,json}, report=default text/{text,json}; canonical error text). Python entry points (ticket-ready.py, the show/list reducer invocations) import it. Pure-bash commands (validate/next-batch/bridge-status/list-epics) shell into 'python3 ticket_output.py resolve <profile> -- args' for the VALIDATED format; a single sourced shim ticket-output.sh does mechanical flag-stripping only (no allowed/validation/error logic in bash). macOS bash 3.2-safe (no mapfile).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: DONE (commit 8ae4872). Canonical --output/-o implemented; --json/--format removed. Single Python source ticket_output.py (profiles reader/ready/report) + thin shim ticket-output.sh. Migrated ready/show/list/validate/next-batch/bridge-status + library + dispatcher + internal self-call + all tests (test_ready_json.py->test_ready_output.py). External git/acli/jira/gh flags untouched. Full suite: 1277 passed, 2 xfailed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
